headline: UBS Reaffirms Buy Rating for Omnicom (OMC)
summary: Omnicom Group Inc. (NYSE:OMC) is one of the 10 best stocks that recently issued new debt. As of the March 26 closing, consensus sentiment for Omnicom Group Inc. (NYSE:OMC) remained moderately bullish. The stock received coverage from 7 analysts, 4 of whom assigned Buy ratings and 2 gave Hold calls. With 1 Sell rating, it […]
